cmd.help.title: Commands
cmd.help.footer: Type /help followed by a command name for details.
cmd.start.welcome:
Welcome to DietDaemon, {{.Name}}! 🥗

I help you track nutrition through chat. Let's get you set up.

First, choose your language:
cmd.start.help: Start the onboarding wizard to set your language and profile.
cmd.start.already_onboarded: You're all set, {{.Name}}! Type /help to see what I can do.
cmd.start.link_prompt:
Your account isn't linked yet. Open the dashboard → Settings → Link Bot, then send me the code with:
/link YOUR_CODE
cmd.link.usage:
Usage: /link <code>
Get your linking code from the dashboard: Settings → Link Bot.
cmd.link.invalid: Invalid or expired linking code. Please generate a new one from the dashboard.
cmd.link.already_linked: This chat is already linked to an account.
cmd.target.set: Targets set: {{.Calories}} kcal | P {{.Protein}}g · C {{.Carbs}}g · F {{.Fat}}g
cmd.timezone.invalid: "{{.TZ}}" is not a valid IANA timezone.
cmd.status.title: 📊 Today's Summary
cmd.status.body:
{{.ConsumedKcal}} / {{.TargetKcal}} kcal
Protein: {{.ConsumedProtein}} / {{.TargetProtein}} g
Carbs: {{.ConsumedCarbs}} / {{.TargetCarbs}} g
Fat: {{.ConsumedFat}} / {{.TargetFat}} g
cmd.status.no_targets: No targets set. Use /target to set your daily goals.
cmd.status.no_meals: No meals logged today. Send me what you ate!
cmd.weight.usage:
Usage: /weight <kg>
Example: /weight 80.5
Use /weight trend to see your progress.
cmd.weight.no_data: No weight data yet. Log your first weight with /weight <kg>
cmd.profile.empty:
No profile set. Use /profile set key=value to fill it in.
Keys: height_cm, birth_date, gender, goal, target_weight_kg, weekly_rate
cmd.profile.usage:
Usage: /profile set key=value
Keys: height_cm (cm), birth_date (YYYY-MM-DD), gender (male/female/other), goal (cut/maintain/bulk), target_weight_kg (kg), weekly_rate (kg/week)
Example: /profile set height_cm=175
cmd.profile.invalid_key:
Unknown profile key: {{.Key}}
Valid keys: height_cm, birth_date, gender, goal, target_weight_kg, weekly_rate
cmd.template.empty: No templates saved yet. Save one from the dashboard or from a logged meal.
cmd.template.usage:
Usage: /template <name> — log a saved template
/template list — show all templates
cmd.template.logged: Logged template "{{.Name}}": {{.Kcal}} kcal | P {{.Protein}}g · C {{.Carbs}}g · F {{.Fat}}g
cmd.food.usage:
Usage: /food <query> — search your food library
/food recent — show frequently used foods
cmd.suggest.usage: Usage: /suggest — get a meal suggestion based on what's left of today's targets and foods you already eat. Alias: /eat
cmd.correct.usage:
Usage: /correct <itemIndex> <grams>g <phrase> — fix an item on your most recent meal
Example: /correct 0 150g grilled chicken breast
cmd.water.usage:
Usage: /water <ml> — log water intake
/water today — show today's total
cmd.water.no_data: No water logged today. Drink up! 💧
cmd.workout.usage:
Usage: /workout <name> <minutes> [intensity]
Intensity: light, moderate, heavy
Example: /workout "Bench Press" 45 heavy
cmd.sleep.usage:
Usage: /sleep <HH:MM bedtime> <HH:MM wake> [quality]
Quality: poor, fair, good, great
Example: /sleep 23:00 07:00 good
cmd.fast.usage:
Usage: /fast start — begin fasting window
/fast end — end current fast
/fast status — check current fast
cmd.fast.no_active: No active fast. Use /fast start to begin.
cmd.fast.already_active: A fast is already in progress. Use /fast end or /fast status.
onboarding.step_language: Choose your language / Escolha seu idioma:
onboarding.step_profile:
Let's set up your profile.
Reply with your height in cm (e.g. 175):
onboarding.step_target_weight: What's your target weight in kg? (e.g. 75):
onboarding.step_weekly_rate: What weekly rate in kg? (e.g. 0.5 for 0.5 kg/week):
onboarding.complete:
🎉 All set, {{.Name}}! Your targets are configured.
Type /status to see today's summary, or just send me what you eat!
